Video.summary: Two people set out into the desert in search of the lost Pegleg gold mine.
Video.title: The Lost Pegleg Mine

Video.summary: Mamie Jaggers is one of the only single women in the mining town of Bullfrog, Nevada.
Video.title: The Little Bullfrog Nugget

Video.summary: A butterfly collector comes to Death Valley and not only finds moths but discovers his true love.
Video.title: The Chivaree

Video.summary: An embittered prospector denies his wife a purple silk dress.
Video.title: Cynthy's Dream Dress

Video.summary: Two rival restaurant owners see their competition take a romantic turn.
Video.title: The Rival Hash Houses

Video.summary: Mary Helen Crosby conceals government papers in her umbrella to insure their safe arrival.
Video.title: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Image.alt: The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella
The Lady with the Blue Silk Umbrella

Video.summary: A young man must prove his identity in order to marry the white girl he loves.
Video.title: Swamper Ike

Video.summary: Two men must find a way to stake a claim without going to jail.
Video.title: The Bandits of Panamint

Video.summary: A man arrives in Rawhide, Nevada, spends his last 10 dollars and becomes rich.
Video.title: Little Oscar's Millions

Video.summary: The town drunk Solomon asks the current newspaper owner to aid in his tall tales to his sister.
Video.title: Solomon in All His Glory

Video.summary: A territorial dispute threatens the border town of Aurora and a young couple's love.
Video.title: Which Side of the Fence?

Video.summary: The new schoolteacher tames her unruly classroom by demonstrating her skills with a six shooter.
Video.title: Dear Teacher

Video.summary: An engineer negotiates a peace treaty with Natives refusing to let a railroad cross their lands.
Video.title: Husband Pro-Tem

Video.summary: A member of the Laguna tribe refuses to return a venerated portrait to neighboring braves.
Video.title: The Saint's Portrait

Video.summary: The story of Cherokee tribesman Sequoia, who developed the Cherokee written language.
Video.title: Sequoia

Video.summary: A tenderfoot becomes a swamper with the Big Team to prove his worth to the girl he loves.
Video.title: The Big Team Rolls

Video.summary: A man must collect back taxes and hires some muscle for assistance, but a surprise awaits him.
Video.title: Death and Taxes

Video.summary: Prospectors offer a friend shares in their mine if he'll marry the homely Aggie Filene.
Video.title: Million Dollar Wedding

Video.summary: A grizzled old man charters a train to break the speed record between Los Angeles and Chicago.
Video.title: Death Valley Scotty

Video.summary: A young bandit is robbing banks and businesses in a sheriff's territory.
Video.title: The Death Valley Kid

Video.summary: A quiet dressmaker for the dance hall girls in a Western mining camp is discovered to be Tiger Lil.
Video.title: The Little Dressmaker of Bodie

Video.summary: A young monk, on his way to the San Gabriel Mission, gets lost and ends up in Death Valley.
Video.title: The Bell of San Gabriel

Video.summary: A young miner is afflicted with a monumental problem: claustrophobia.
Video.title: Yaller

Video.summary: Bandits board a gold-carrying ship and murder most of the passengers and crew.
Video.title: I Am Joaquin

Video.summary: Blind and bitter Susie witnesses a stage robbery and her heightened senses play a key role.
Video.title: Sixth Sense

Video.summary: A condemned outlaw is offered his freedom if he helps capture his criminal friend.
Video.title: The Informer Who Cried

Video.summary: Scout Kit Carson competes with a trapper for the hand of a Native woman.
Video.title: Spring Rendezvous

Video.summary: Two prospectors pull a hoax on a banker who wants their mine.
Video.title: The Great Diamond Mines

Video.summary: A desert dwelling couple struggle with life in Death Valley.
Video.title: Dress for a Desert Girl

Video.summary: A teacher engaged to a minister tries to conceal her gambling.
Video.title: Lottie's Legacy

Video.summary: Renegade Natives led by a white man named Clay threaten the residents of a decommissioned fort.
Video.title: Long Night at Fort Lonely

Video.summary: Two outlaws devise a mining operation and finance it with stolen bullion.
Video.title: How to Beat a Badman

Video.summary: Mormons must save the life of a dying man or face the wrath of his tribe.
Video.title: A Key for the Fort

Video.summary: Lumberjack Will is attracted to the spoiled daughter of his boss, Mr. Bell.
Video.title: The Taming of Trudy Bell

Video.summary: A convict is released from prison, but not released from his past.
Video.title: Tracy's Triumph

Video.summary: A gambler is determined to collect his poker winnings: half of Tombstone, Arizona.
Video.title: The Duke of Tombstone

Video.summary: A cook skims gold nuggets off miners while working at their camp and faces the penalty of hanging.
Video.title: Early Candle Lighten

Video.summary: As a nun aids a wounded robber, she learns he is a friend of the notorious Billy the Kid.
Video.title: Lost Sheep in Trinidad

Video.summary: Two members of a wagon train try to reach help before their group dies of starvation.
Video.title: Out of the Valley of Death

Image.alt: Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death
Out of the Valley of Death

Video.summary: Tiger Lil tries to leave her dance hall days behind her, but Frank Johnson won't give up on her.
Video.title: Lady with a Past
